title: 航班異常
desc: 誤點、取消、改簽、轉機、安檢

phrases.en: My flight was cancelled.
phrases.homophone: 買 福賴 瓦斯 坎叟

phrases.en: How long is the delay?
phrases.homophone: 好 龍 意思 惹 低累

phrases.en: Which gate?
phrases.tip: 指示牌看不懂就直接問

phrases.en: Where's the transfer desk?
phrases.tip: transfer desk = 轉機/改簽櫃台
phrases.homophone: 威爾斯 傳斯佛 戴斯克

phrases.en: My flight was cancelled — can you rebook me on the next flight?
phrases.zh: 我的班機取消了，可以幫我改訂下一班嗎？

phrases.en: Can you rebook me at no extra charge?
phrases.zh: 可以免加價幫我改簽嗎？
phrases.tip: no extra charge = 不另外收費

phrases.en: How much is the change fee?
Can I get on an earlier flight?
phrases.zh: 我可以搭更早的班機嗎？

phrases.en: Can you put me on standby?
I missed my connection.
Which gate for connecting flights?
Do I need to take out my laptop and liquids?
phrases.zh: 我需要把筆電和液體拿出來嗎？

phrases.en: Will the airline cover a hotel for tonight?
phrases.zh: 航空公司會提供今晚的住宿嗎？

phrases.en: Do I get a meal voucher for the delay?
Am I entitled to compensation for the delay?
phrases.zh: 這次誤點我可以申請賠償嗎？

phrases.en: Is my checked bag going to make the connection?
phrases.zh: 我托運的行李來得及轉機嗎？

lines.en: Good evening. How can I help you?
lines.zh: 晚安，有什麼需要幫忙的嗎？

alt.en: Hi there, what can I do for you?
alt.zh: 你好，需要我幫什麼忙嗎？

alt.en: Next in line, please. How may I help?
alt.zh: 下一位，請問需要什麼服務？

lines.en: My flight was cancelled. Can you rebook me on the next flight?
lines.zh: 我的班機取消了，可以幫我改訂下一班嗎？

lines.en: I'm sorry about that. Let me check availability.
lines.zh: 很抱歉，我幫你查一下還有沒有位子。

alt.en: So sorry for the trouble. One moment while I look.
alt.zh: 造成不便很抱歉，稍等我查一下。

alt.en: Apologies. Let me see what flights are open.
alt.zh: 抱歉，我看看還有哪些班機。

lines.en: Can you rebook me at no extra charge?
lines.zh: 可以免加價幫我改簽嗎？

lines.en: Yes, since the cancellation was our fault, there's no charge.
lines.zh: 可以，因為是我們的取消，不會收費。

alt.en: Of course, the change fee is waived for a cancellation.
alt.zh: 當然，取消改票免手續費。

alt.en: Absolutely, no extra charge in this case.
alt.zh: 沒問題，這種情況不另外收費。

lines.en: Great. I also missed my connection. Which gate for connecting flights?
lines.zh: 太好了。我還錯過了轉機，轉機要去哪個登機門？

lines.en: The next flight leaves from Gate 22. I'll put you on it.
lines.zh: 下一班從22號登機門起飛，我幫你排上去。

lines.en: How long is the delay? Will the airline cover a hotel for tonight?
lines.zh: 誤點多久？航空公司會提供今晚的住宿嗎？

lines.en: About five hours. Yes, we'll provide a hotel and a meal voucher.
lines.zh: 大約五小時。會的，我們提供住宿和餐券。

lines.en: Thank you. Can you put me on standby for an earlier flight too?
lines.zh: 謝謝。也可以幫我排更早班機的候補嗎？

lines.en: Of course. You're on the standby list now. Here's your new boarding pass.
lines.zh: 當然，你已在候補名單上了，這是你的新登機證。

lines.en: Thank you so much for your help.
lines.zh: 非常感謝你的幫忙。

title: 防扒與自保
desc: 防扒手、拒絕推銷搭訕、報平安、借用求助

slots: watch my bags for a second

phrases.en: No, thank you.
I'm not interested.
Please leave me alone.
phrases.tip: 被糾纏時用，語氣要堅定
phrases.homophone: 普利斯 立夫 米 額弄

phrases.en: I've been pickpocketed!
phrases.homophone: 愛夫 賓 匹克帕基特

phrases.en: Someone stole my wallet!
Keep your hands off my bag!
phrases.tip: 察覺有人靠太近時大聲說

phrases.en: Can I use your phone? It's an emergency.
phrases.zh: 可以借用你的手機嗎？這是緊急狀況。
phrases.tip: 報平安或報警都用得到
phrases.homophone: 坎 愛 又斯 幼兒 風？依次 恩 伊墨真西

phrases.en: Where can I charge my phone?
Can you call me a taxi?
Please watch my bags for a second.
Is this area safe at night?
Sorry, I don't do surveys.
phrases.tip: 假問卷常是分心扒竊手法

phrases.en: Can I see your police ID, please?
phrases.zh: 可以出示你的警察證件嗎？
phrases.tip: 假警察會要你交錢包，先驗證件

phrases.en: I'm not buying anything, thank you.
phrases.tip: 面對強迫推銷，重複同一句就好

phrases.en: I'm meeting my friends over there.
phrases.tip: 讓對方知道你不是落單，方便脫身

phrases.en: I need to report a theft.

dialogue.title: 皮夾被扒，向店家求助報平安

lines.en: Excuse me, I need help. I've been pickpocketed!
lines.zh: 不好意思，我需要幫忙，我被扒了！

lines.en: Oh no, are you okay? What happened?
lines.zh: 天啊，你還好嗎？發生什麼事？

alt.en: Calm down, tell me what happened.
alt.zh: 冷靜一點，告訴我怎麼了。

lines.en: Someone stole my wallet on the street. Can I use your phone? It's an emergency.
lines.zh: 有人在街上偷了我的皮夾。可以借用你的手機嗎？這是緊急狀況。

lines.en: Of course. Here, use mine.
lines.zh: 當然，來，用我的。

lines.en: Thank you. Can you also call me a taxi to the police station?
lines.zh: 謝謝。也可以幫我叫台計程車去警察局嗎？

lines.en: Sure, I'll call one now. Please keep your other bags close.
lines.zh: 好，我馬上叫車。你其他的包包也顧緊一點。

alt.en: On it. Watch your belongings while we wait.
alt.zh: 在處理了，等車時看好你的東西。

alt.en: Right away. Hold your bag tight, just in case.
alt.zh: 馬上，包包抓緊點以防萬一。

lines.en: A man kept pushing me to buy something right before it happened.
lines.zh: 出事前有個男的一直纏著我要我買東西。

lines.en: That's a common scam here. They distract you and take your wallet.
lines.zh: 這裡常見這種手法，他們分散你注意再偷皮夾。

lines.en: Is this area safe at night?
lines.zh: 這一帶晚上安全嗎？

lines.en: It's better to avoid the crowds after dark. Stay alert.
lines.zh: 天黑後最好別往人多的地方去，多留意四周。

lines.en: Thank you so much. Where can I charge my phone too?
lines.zh: 太謝謝你了。另外哪裡可以幫手機充電？

lines.en: There's an outlet by the counter. Take your time.
lines.zh: 櫃台旁有插座，你慢慢來。
